ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "age_years" INTEGER /* Age of the subject in years */,
  "height_inches" REAL /* Height of the subject in inches */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject (male, female) */,
  "smoke" TEXT /* Smoking status of the subject (yes, no) */,
  "caesarean" TEXT /* Mode of birth (yes, no) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was last updated */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Level of physical activity */,
  "family_history_details" TEXT /* Detailed family medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lung_capacity_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lung capacity measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject for whom the measurement was taken */,
  "lung_capacity_cc" REAL /* Lung capacity of the subject in cubic centimeters (cc) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the lung capacity was measured */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the lung capacity was measured */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure lung capacity */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Operator who conducted the lung capacity test */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate during the measurement */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate during the measurement */,
  "oxygen_saturation" REAL /* Oxygen saturation level during the measurement */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors during the measurement */,
  "measurement_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lung_capacity_measurements_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Follow-up date for the condition */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms related to the condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition */,
  "hospitalization" TEXT /* History of hospitalization for the condition */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medications prescribed */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes from follow-up visits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the subject */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the subject */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the subject */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of respiratory conditions */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "number_of_subjects" INTEGER /* Number of subjects enrolled in the study */,
  "study_location" TEXT /* Location where the study is conducted */,
  "study_publication" TEXT /* Link to published results */,
  "study_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject enrolled in the study */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date the subject dropped out of the study (if applicable) */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out of the study (if applicable) */,
  "consent_form_signed" TEXT /* Date when the consent form was signed */,
  "consent_form_version" TEXT /* Version of the consent form */,
  "study_group" TEXT /* Group to which the subject belongs in the study */,
  "randomization_id" TEXT /* Randomization ID for the subject */,
  "consent_withdrawn" TEXT /* Date when consent was withdrawn (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id", "study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_license" TEXT /* License under which the file is shared */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the file */,
  "file_tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)
